records.signature:
CommandContext(
        string SearchText,
        EventCallback<string> OnSearch,
        EventCallback<KeyboardEventArgs> OnNavigationKey,
        int VisibleItemCount,

examples.title: Default
examples.code: Calendar Settings Profile

examples.title: Navigation
examples.code: Dashboard Profile Settings Notifications Messages

examples.title: Disabled Items
examples.code:
<Command>
    <CommandInput Placeholder="Search..." />
    <CommandList>
        <CommandEmpty />
        <CommandGroup Heading="Actions">
            <CommandItem FilterValue="New File">New File</CommandItem>
            <CommandItem FilterValue="Export" Disabled="true">Export (Pro only)</CommandItem>
            <CommandItem FilterValue="Save">Save</CommandItem>
        </CommandGroup>
    </CommandList>
</Command>

mdSummary:
# Command

Command palette — keyboard-driven finder for actions.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Overlay
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/command
